PARTIES ADVISED THEY MIGHT RECEIVE NOTICE OF CT DATE IN #4 FOR OSC IF DISML NOT FILED. HOWEVER, AS THIS CASE PREDATES THE TRIAL DELAY SYSTEM, THAT IS NOT LIKELY.
